title: Living in Ladue, MO — Complete 2026 Guide
content:
Ladue is an upscale suburban community with ~9,000 residents and one of Missouri's highest median household incomes (~,000). Residents include doctors, lawyers, executives, entrepreneurs, and athletes.

Location: Mid-county, borders Huntleigh, Clayton, Frontenac, Westwood. Close to downtown Clayton shopping, dining, and corporate HQs.

Housing: K to M+. Smaller homes K-K exist contrary to assumptions. Traditional historic, mid-century modern ranches, new custom estates. Key neighborhoods: Briarcliff, Twin Springs, Fair Oaks, La Hacienda.

Schools: Ladue Horton Watkins High School ranks among STL's best. Private options: John Burroughs and MICDS (considered most prestigious). Ladue schools accessible from Olivette, eastern Creve Coeur, eastern Westwood, northern Frontenac, northern Huntleigh, parts of western Richmond Heights.

Recreation & Dining: Exclusive country clubs (St. Louis Country Club, Old Warson Country Club). Tillis Park (75 acres, playgrounds, trails). Clayton Road boutique shopping. Plaza Frontenac nearby for upscale retail.

Demographics: Mix of generational families with decades-long roots and newer transplants in different neighborhoods and social circles.
